# NLContextualEmbedding.AssetsResult.notAvailable

**Case**

A result that indicates that the assets aren’t present on-device.

## Declaration

```swift
case notAvailable
```

## Getting the result status

- **NLContextualEmbedding.AssetsResult.available**: A result that indicates that the assets are present on-device.
- **NLContextualEmbedding.AssetsResult.error**: A result that indicates the framework encounters an error.

items.description: A result that indicates that the assets are present on-device.
